name: metamesh-uga
description: The MCP Operating System — A Universal Control Plane for AI Agents and MCP Infrastructure

scripts.deploy:workers: wrangler deploy --config packages/gateway/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/registry/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/discovery/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/trust/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/security/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/policy/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/benchmark/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/lifecycle/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/intelligence/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/compatibility/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/analytics/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/health/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/config/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/cache/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/self-healing/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/recommendation/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/cost/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/inserter/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/updater/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/eliminatore/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/alerts/wrangler.toml && wrangler deploy --config packages/agent-billing/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build && npm run deploy:workers && npm run deploy:dashboard && npm run deploy:landing
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/002_seed_data.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/003_discovery_log.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/004_trust_and_lifecycle.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/005_semantic_search.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/006_policies.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/007_benchmark_results.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/008_registry_sources_seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/009_analytics_metrics.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/010_registry_snapshots.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/011_config.sql && wrangler d1 execute metamesh-catalog --file=./shared/migrations/012_health_checks.sql
scripts.set-and-forget: npm run deploy:production && npm run self-healing:start

author: Davanzo Keoma
